response.title: Lead Financial Analyst
response.description: We are seeking a highly skilled Lead Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team at Global Finance Solutions. The ideal candidate will lead financial planning and analysis efforts, provide actionable insights, and drive performance improvements across our organization. This role requires strong analytical capabilities, exceptional communication skills, and a deep understanding of financial modeling and forecasting.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field; MBA preferred
